mapper.select: SELECT id, seat_id, reader_id, reservation_id, checkin_time, checkout_time, status FROM seat_checkin ORDER BY checkin_time DESC
SELECT id, seat_id, reader_id, reservation_id, checkin_time, checkout_time, status FROM seat_checkin WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, seat_id, reader_id, reservation_id, checkin_time, checkout_time, status FROM seat_checkin WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY checkin_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, seat_id, reader_id, reservation_id, checkin_time, checkout_time, status FROM seat_checkin WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY checkin_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat_checkin (seat_id, reader_id, reservation_id, status) VALUES (#{seatId}, #{readerId}, #{reservationId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE seat_checkin SET checkout_time = NOW(), status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_checkin WHERE DATE(checkin_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_checkin WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND DATE(checkin_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT DATE(checkin_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM seat_checkin WHERE DATE(checkin_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(checkin_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT HOUR(checkin_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM seat_checkin WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} GROUP BY HOUR(checkin_time) ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT s.area AS area, COUNT(*) AS count FROM seat_checkin sc JOIN seat s ON sc.seat_id = s.id WHERE sc.reader_id = #{readerId} GROUP BY s.area ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT DAYOFWEEK(checkin_time) AS dayOfWeek, HOUR(checkin_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM seat_checkin GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(checkin_time), HOUR(checkin_time) ORDER BY dayOfWeek, hour
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_checkin WHERE status = 1

SELECT HOUR(checkin_time) AS hour, DAYOFWEEK(checkin_time) AS day_of_week, COUNT(*) AS count FROM seat_checkin WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} GROUP BY HOUR(checkin_time), DAYOFWEEK(checkin_time) ORDER BY count DESC
